title: Spacer
description: Spacer: A spacer defining an edge of a fabric panel in GSA.

Start.description: Defines the start position of the element. Note that Nodes can contain Supports which should not be confused with Releases. Node: 0D finite element for structural analysis. Node class contains positional information as well as orientation and support.

End.description: Defines the end position of the element. Note that Nodes can contain Supports which should not be confused with Releases. Node: 0D finite element for structural analysis. Node class contains positional information as well as orientation and support.

SpacerProperty.description: Spacer property of the spacer, defining the spacer type. SpacerProperty: Property for spacer elements.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
